name: EventLog
short: Server event logging (joins/leaves, edits/deletes, roles, voice).
description: Log server events to a channel: member joins/leaves, message edits/deletes, role and nickname changes, voice activity. Each event type can be toggled. Opt-in per guild, bilingual (DE/EN), with web dashboard integration.
author: Domekologe
install_msg:
Thanks for installing EventLog!

Load it with `[p]load eventlog`, then configure it via its commands or the PDC web dashboard (if installed).
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-server logging configuration only. Logged events are posted to a Discord channel and are not persistently retained by the cog.
